prompt: Create a Salesforce org architecture diagram for a B2B company using Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, and Marketing Cloud. Include identity, integration middleware, ERP, and data warehouse. Output Draw.io and PNG into ./artifacts/diagrams/.
assertions: Output includes a PNG export artifact.
Diagram includes all requested Salesforce clouds (Sales, Service, Experience, Marketing).
Diagram includes identity, middleware, ERP, and data warehouse nodes.
Connections represent integration/data flow between major system groups.
